parameters.query:
SELECT
    COALESCE(p.id, 0)              AS property_id,
    COALESCE(p.wp_post_id, 0)      AS wp_post_id,
    COALESCE(p.name, '')            AS referencia,
    COALESCE(p.title, '')           AS titulo,
    COALESCE(p.description, '')     AS descripcion_detallada,
    COALESCE(p.price, 0)            AS precio,
    COALESCE(p.area, 0)             AS metros_cuadrados,
    COALESCE(p.bedrooms, 0)         AS habitaciones,
    COALESCE(p.bathrooms, 0)        AS banos,
    COALESCE(p.parking_spaces, 0)   AS parqueaderos,
    p.year_built                    AS anio_construccion,
    COALESCE(t.name, '')            AS tipo_propiedad,
    COALESCE(p.street, '')          AS direccion,
    COALESCE(p.city, '')            AS ciudad,
    COALESCE(p.sector_keywords, '') AS sectores_relacionados,
    CASE
        WHEN p.wp_post_id IS NOT NULL AND p.wp_post_id > 0
        THEN 'https://inmobi.com.ec/?p=' || p.wp_post_id
        ELSE NULL
    END AS link_web,
    CASE WHEN p.id IS NULL THEN 'no_encontrada' ELSE 'ok' END AS estado
FROM (SELECT 1) dummy
LEFT JOIN estate_property p
  ON p.active = true
  AND (
    -- Busqueda por ID exacto (Odoo id o wp_post_id)
    ({{ $json.id_propiedad }} > 0 AND (
      p.id = {{ $json.id_propiedad }}
      OR p.wp_post_id = {{ $json.id_propiedad }}
    ))
    OR
    -- Busqueda por texto: cada palabra separada por % para tolerancia
    ({{ $json.id_propiedad }} = 0 AND '{{ $json.busqueda }}' != '' AND
      (COALESCE(p.title,'') || ' ' || COALESCE(p.street,'') || ' ' || COALESCE(p.city,''))
      ILIKE '%' || replace('{{ $json.busqueda }}', ' ', '%') || '%'
    )
  )
LEFT JOIN estate_property_type t ON p.property_type_id = t.id
ORDER BY (p.state = 'available') DESC NULLS LAST, p.id DESC
LIMIT 1;

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json)[0] || { error: 'Propiedad no encontrada' }, null, 2) }}
